response.justification: Bogdan possesses a strong background in geospatial data processing through his work founding GISCollective and developing mapping applications. While his most recent roles focus heavily on TypeScript and Node.js, he has relevant systems programming experience using C++ and Dlang, including building low-latency, high-throughput microservices. His combination of GIS expertise, distributed systems knowledge, and overall engineering seniority makes him a compelling candidate despite lacking recent production Rust or modern C++.
strengths: Extensive domain experience in geospatial data platforms and GIS applications (GISCollective, Green Map).
Proven ability to build low-latency, high-throughput distributed systems (handling millions of requests/second at Dunnhumby).
Strong engineering fundamentals with a track record of implementing TDD, CI/CD, and leading technical workshops.
concerns: Primary recent experience is in TypeScript and Node.js rather than the requested C++ or Rust.
Professional C++ experience is somewhat dated (2014-2015), though compensated by deep Dlang systems expertise.
Lacks explicit mention of routing algorithm implementation or map tiling systems, despite general GIS experience.
